description: Configurable first-level and second-level label model for model tagging, candidate pool items, reports and future domains.
core_rule: A workspace owns one unified label policy. The first-level labels constrain model-generated news structure and post-dedupe label finalization; per-source label paths are optional hints only.

ai_sql_categories.purpose: The 10 first-level labels required by the current company SQL export and first-phase clustering/recommendation directory.

rules: Source management pages must expose the workspace unified label policy before per-source controls.
Model prompts for raw-to-news generation must use workspaces.config_json.label_policy.allowed_primary_categories as the legal category list.
After dedupe, model/rule label finalization must use the same workspace label policy, not per-source labels.
Source management pages may configure per-source label paths only as source hints; they must not shrink or replace the workspace legal label list.
Second-level labels are stored as labels with parent_label_id pointing to a first-level label.
Clustering and recommendation rules should reference label_set_code, label code and optional parent/child label paths.
Candidate pool pages should display labels attached to the dedupe winner and its group.
Company SQL export must map adopted daily report items to config/taxonomy/news_categories.json until the internal platform supports broader taxonomies.
Adding hardware or semiconductor labels should add a label set or domain pack, not new columns.
